name: Crystal Asige
bio: Sen. Crystal Kegehi Asige is a nominated Senator in the 4th Senate of the 13th Parliament of Kenya, representing persons with disabilities and special interest groups including youth and women. She serves under the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) party and is an advocate for diversity and inclusion.

name: Esther Anyieni Okenyuri
bio: Sen. Esther Anyieni Okenyuri is a nominated Senator, sponsored by the United Democratic Alliance (UDA), in the 13th Parliament (4th Senate of Kenya). She was gazetted by the Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission to replace Soipan Tuya, who had been appointed Cabinet Secretary for Environment. Okenyuri serves as Vice-Chairperson of the Senate Standing Committee on Trade, Industrialization and Tourism, to which she was elected unopposed on 23 February 2023.

name: Mohamed Faki Mwinyihaji
bio: Sen. Mohamed Faki Mwinyihaji is the sitting Senator for Mombasa County, representing ODM in the 13th Parliament of Kenya (2022-2027). An advocate by profession, he is serving his second term, having first been elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022, and chairs the Senate Standing Committee on Land, Environment and Natural Resources.

bio: Sen. Joyce Chepkoech Korir is a UDA Nominated Senator in the Senate of the 13th Parliament of Kenya. She previously served as the Women Representative for Bomet County in the 12th Parliament (2017-2022) under the Jubilee Party.

name: Moses Otieno Kajwang'
bio: Sen. Moses Otieno Kajwang' is the Senator for Homa Bay County, elected on the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) ticket, serving in the 13th Parliament of Kenya (2022-2027). First elected in the 12 February 2015 by-election and re-elected in 2017 and 2022, he is serving his third term and chairs the Senate County Public Accounts Committee (CPAC).

bio: Sen. Ledama Olekina is the sitting Senator for Narok County in the 13th Parliament of Kenya, representing the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM), and also serves as Senate Minority Whip. name: Margaret Kamar
bio: Sen. Margaret Jepkoech Kamar is a nominated Senator in the 13th Parliament of Kenya (2022-2027), nominated by the Jubilee Party under the Azimio la Umoja coalition. She currently serves as Vice-Chairperson of the Senate Standing Committee on Education, having previously served as Member of Parliament for Eldoret East (2008-2013).

name: Recha Julius Murgor
bio: Sen. Recha Julius Murgor is the Senator for West Pokot County in the 13th Parliament of Kenya, representing the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) under the Kenya Kwanza coalition. He was elected in the 2022 general election, defeating incumbent Samuel Poghisio (KANU) by 72,240 votes to 41,119, and his term is ongoing. He previously served as Member of Parliament for Kapenguria Constituency, first elected in 2007.

name: Enoch Kiio Wambua
bio: Sen. Enoch Kiio Wambua is the sitting Senator for Kitui County, representing the Wiper Democratic Movement (WDM-K) in the Senate of the 13th Parliament of Kenya. First elected in 2017, he was re-elected in the August 2022 general election. Prior to the Senate he had a media career, serving as an associate editor at Nation Media (2005-2013) and managing editor at the Standard (2013-2016).
